'''tasala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plaguiness|plaguiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plaguiness|plaguiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tasala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsælæth|tæsælæth]] || [[word:tæsælæj|tæsælæj]] || [[word:tæsælæsh|tæsælæsh]] || [[word:tæsælæ|tæsælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasasalath|tasasalath]] || [[word:tasasalaj|tasasalaj]] || [[word:tasasalash|tasasalash]] || [[word:tasasala|tasasala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasalath|tasalath]] || [[word:tasalaj|tasalaj]] || [[word:tasalash|tasalash]] || [[word:tasala|tasala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasaflafth|tasaflafth]] || [[word:tasaflafj|tasaflafj]] || [[word:tasaflafsh|tasaflafsh]] || [[word:tasaflaf|tasaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasalatha|tasalatha]] || [[word:tasalaja|tasalaja]] || [[word:tasalasha|tasalasha]] || [[word:tasalaka|tasalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasalath|tasalath]] || [[word:tasalaj|tasalaj]] || [[word:tasalash|tasalash]] || [[word:tasala|tasala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasalathal|tasalathal]] || [[word:tasalajal|tasalajal]] || [[word:tasalashal|tasalashal]] || [[word:tasalakal|tasalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasalaathatha|tasalaathatha]] || [[word:tasalaajaja|tasalaajaja]] || [[word:tasalaashasha|tasalaashasha]] || [[word:tasalaaka|tasalaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasalathan|tasalathan]] || [[word:tasalajan|tasalajan]] || [[word:tasalashan|tasalashan]] || [[word:tasalakan|tasalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasalathaoro|tasalathaoro]] || [[word:tasalajaoro|tasalajaoro]] || [[word:tasalashaoro|tasalashaoro]] || [[word:tasalakaoro|tasalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
